profiles.title: General retail and groceries
profiles.description: Provision stores, mini-marts, supermarkets, and mixed everyday retail.

profiles.title: Animal feed and agricultural supplies
profiles.description: Poultry, fish, and livestock feed plus seeds, fertilizer, and farm supplies.

profiles.title: Fashion and apparel
profiles.description: Clothing, shoes, bags, accessories, and other size or colour-based goods.

profiles.title: Fabrics and tailoring
profiles.description: Fabric sellers, tailors, fashion designers, alterations, and made-to-measure work.

profiles.title: Drinks and water distribution
profiles.description: Bottled water, soft drinks, beverages, depots, and crate-based sales.

profiles.title: Food, bakery, and catering
profiles.description: Restaurants, bakeries, caterers, meal vendors, and prepared food businesses.

profiles.title: Beauty, salon, barbershop, and spa
profiles.description: Beauty products and fixed or tracked personal-care services.

profiles.title: Laundry and dry cleaning
profiles.description: Garment washing, ironing, dry cleaning, express work, and pickup-ready services.

profiles.title: Electronics and phone shops
profiles.description: Phones, computers, accessories, appliances, and optional device repair work.

profiles.title: Repair and maintenance
profiles.description: Device, appliance, equipment, and general inspection or repair services.

profiles.title: Pharmacy and health retail
profiles.description: Medicine, wellness, personal-care, and other counted or packaged health goods.

profiles.title: Hardware and building materials
profiles.description: Cement, paint, pipes, electrical supplies, tools, and measured materials.

profiles.title: Wholesale and distribution
profiles.description: Bulk sellers, distributors, depots, and businesses selling cartons, packs, and pieces.

profiles.title: Professional services
profiles.description: Consulting, accounting, legal, design, training, and other client work.

profiles.title: Other or mixed business
profiles.description: A business that spans several categories or is not listed yet.
